name: review-clean-utils
prompt: Review evals/fixtures/clean-utils.ts for bugs using the bug-review process. Utility functions — formatCurrency, safeJsonParse, debounce, chunk, retry. Give me a thorough review.
expected_output: Reports no significant bugs found or only very minor observations. No false positive CRITICAL/HIGH findings.
assertions: Transcript concludes no significant bugs found
No finding alleges a security vulnerability
